definitions.text: førsteledd i ord som gjelder tvangsfullbyrdelse tvangsfullbyrding i rettsvesenet
definitions.translation: prefix in words concerning enforcement, compulsory execution in the legal system

definitions.text: i ord som namsmann, namsmyndighet og namsrett
definitions.translation: in words like namsmann (bailiff), namsmyndighet (enforcement authority), and namsrett (enforcement court)
